step_by_step_thinking: The patient's symptoms of intense itching primarily affecting the finger webs, especially at nighttime, along with the presence of burrows on examination strongly suggest scabies infection. This condition typically presents these characteristic features due to mite infestation under the skin causing an allergic reaction leading to itchiness and visible tunnel-like structures (burrows).
